name: Advanced Technologies Group, Ltd.
summary: Advanced Technologies Group, Ltd. focuses on the development of the MoveIdiot.com Website in the United States. The MoveIdiot.com enables individuals and businesses to keep track of their property on-line. The software program enables users to manage their possessions on-line and print automatically generated labels that are sealable to be used in the event of moving from one location to another. Advanced Technologies Group, Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Red Bank, New Jersey.
